name: ghost-mcp
description: Ghost blog management for Claude Code — list/create/update posts and pages, manage tags, send newsletters, and sync local markdown drafts.

ghost_url.title: Ghost URL
ghost_url.description: Your Ghost blog URL (must be HTTPS unless localhost). Example: https://blog.example.com

ghost_api_key.title: Admin API Key
ghost_api_key.description: Ghost Admin API key in id:secret format. Get it from Ghost Admin → Settings → Integrations → Add custom integration.
